rationale: The US-Iran deal momentum continues to pose a risk of diverting American diplomatic and military attention away from Ukraine; war itself continues at maximum background level with no new qualitative change.

top_events.title: Trump seeks 'off-ramp' from Iran war; deal within reach
top_events.summary: A near-term US-Iran deal could shift Washington's focus and resources away from Ukraine support, a persistent concern for Ukrainians dependent on Western military and financial aid.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: Fighting continues across Ukrainian territory with no ceasefire or qualitative shift reported this cycle. Background level maintained at maximum.

top_events.title: Israel hits south Lebanon, broader Middle East instability
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East escalation keeps US attention divided, indirectly reducing bandwidth for Ukraine diplomacy and aid prioritization.
